scripts.compact:all: npm run compact:order && npm run compact:matching && npm run compact:settlement && npm run compact:liquidation && npm run compact:aggregate
scripts.compact:order: compact compile src/zkperps-order.compact src/managed/zkperps-order && node scripts/strip-managed-sourcemaps.mjs src/managed/zkperps-order
scripts.compact:matching: compact compile src/zkperps-matching.compact src/managed/zkperps-matching && node scripts/strip-managed-sourcemaps.mjs src/managed/zkperps-matching
scripts.compact:settlement: compact compile src/zkperps-settlement.compact src/managed/zkperps-settlement && node scripts/strip-managed-sourcemaps.mjs src/managed/zkperps-settlement
scripts.compact:liquidation: compact compile src/zkperps-liquidation.compact src/managed/zkperps-liquidation && node scripts/strip-managed-sourcemaps.mjs src/managed/zkperps-liquidation
scripts.compact:aggregate: compact compile src/zkperps-aggregate.compact src/managed/zkperps-aggregate && node scripts/strip-managed-sourcemaps.mjs src/managed/zkperps-aggregate
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && cp -R src/managed dist/managed && cp src/*.compact dist/ && node scripts/strip-managed-sourcemaps.mjs dist/managed/zkperps-order dist/managed/zkperps-matching dist/managed/zkperps-settlement dist/managed/zkperps-liquidation dist/managed/zkperps-aggregate
